items_flat.title_en: Sam Altman Invites Builds with GPT-5.6 Sol, Offers OpenAI Archive Gift
items_flat.title_zh: Sam Altman 邀請用 GPT-5.6 Sol 打造作品，最佳者獲 OpenAI 檔案館禮物
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman posted on X encouraging users to share interesting projects built with GPT-5.6 Sol. He offered to send the creator of the coolest thing a special gift from the OpenAI archives. The post follows the model's July 9 general availability launch across ChatGPT, Codex and API.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 執行長 Sam Altman 在 X 發文，鼓勵使用者分享使用 GPT-5.6 Sol 打造的有趣專案，並承諾將送出 OpenAI 檔案館的特別禮物給最酷作品創作者。此帖延續該模型7月9日正式上線 ChatGPT、Codex 與 API 的消息。
items_flat.quote: i'd love to see interesting things people have built with 5.6 sol. i will send the person who made the coolest thing a special gift from the openai archives.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「我很想看到人們用 5.6 sol 打造的有趣東西。我會送做出最酷東西的人一份來自 OpenAI 檔案館的特別禮物。」

items_flat.title_en: Elon Musk Notes Grok 4.5 Benchmark Edge Over Fable; Grok Build Gets Keyboard Upgrades
items_flat.title_zh: Elon Musk 指出 Grok 4.5 基準測試略勝 Fable；Grok Build 推出鍵盤與導航更新
items_flat.summary_en: xAI's Elon Musk stated that Grok 4.5 ranks slightly above Claude Fable on some software benchmarks, describing Fable as an incredibly good model. Grok Build also received recent updates (v0.2.98/v0.2.99) adding smoother navigation, improved keyboard workflows, multiline input, and authentication pinning options.
items_flat.summary_zh: xAI 的 Elon Musk 表示 Grok 4.5 在某些軟體基準測試中略高於 Claude Fable，並稱 Fable 是極佳模型。Grok Build 近期推出 v0.2.98/v0.2.99 更新，新增更順暢導航、改善鍵盤工作流程、多行輸入及認證固定等功能。
items_flat.quote: Grok 4.5 even ranks slightly above Fable, which is an incredibly good model, on some software benchmarks!
items_flat.quote_zh: 「Grok 4.5 在某些軟體基準測試中甚至略高於 Fable，而 Fable 是一個非常優秀的模型！」

items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Extends Claude Fable 5 Paid Plan Access and Higher Claude Code Limits Through July 19
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 將 Claude Fable 5 付費方案存取及 Claude Code 更高用量限制延長至7月19日
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic announced via @claudeai on X that it is extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, allowing up to half of weekly usage limits on Fable 5, with continued access via usage credits afterward. It is also keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher through July 19.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 透過 @claudeai 在 X 宣布，將所有付費方案的 Claude Fable 5 存取延長至7月19日，使用者可使用高達每週用量限制的一半於 Fable 5，之後可透過用量點數繼續使用；同時 Claude Code 的每週速率限制維持高出50%。
items_flat.quote: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.
items_flat.quote_zh: 「我們將所有付費方案的 Claude Fable 5 存取延長至7月19日，同時將 Claude Code 的每週速率限制維持高出50%。」

anthropic.title_en: Anthropic Extends Claude Fable 5 Paid Plan Access and Higher Claude Code Limits Through July 19
anthropic.title_zh: Anthropic 將 Claude Fable 5 付費方案存取及 Claude Code 更高用量限制延長至7月19日
anthropic.summary_en: Anthropic announced via @claudeai on X that it is extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, allowing up to half of weekly usage limits on Fable 5, with continued access via usage credits afterward. It is also keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher through July 19.
anthropic.summary_zh: Anthropic 透過 @claudeai 在 X 宣布，將所有付費方案的 Claude Fable 5 存取延長至7月19日，使用者可使用高達每週用量限制的一半於 Fable 5，之後可透過用量點數繼續使用；同時 Claude Code 的每週速率限制維持高出50%。
anthropic.quote: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.
anthropic.quote_zh: 「我們將所有付費方案的 Claude Fable 5 存取延長至7月19日，同時將 Claude Code 的每週速率限制維持高出50%。」

xai.title_en: Elon Musk Notes Grok 4.5 Benchmark Edge Over Fable; Grok Build Gets Keyboard Upgrades
xai.title_zh: Elon Musk 指出 Grok 4.5 基準測試略勝 Fable；Grok Build 推出鍵盤與導航更新
xai.summary_en: xAI's Elon Musk stated that Grok 4.5 ranks slightly above Claude Fable on some software benchmarks, describing Fable as an incredibly good model. Grok Build also received recent updates (v0.2.98/v0.2.99) adding smoother navigation, improved keyboard workflows, multiline input, and authentication pinning options.
xai.summary_zh: xAI 的 Elon Musk 表示 Grok 4.5 在某些軟體基準測試中略高於 Claude Fable，並稱 Fable 是極佳模型。Grok Build 近期推出 v0.2.98/v0.2.99 更新，新增更順暢導航、改善鍵盤工作流程、多行輸入及認證固定等功能。
xai.quote: Grok 4.5 even ranks slightly above Fable, which is an incredibly good model, on some software benchmarks!
xai.quote_zh: 「Grok 4.5 在某些軟體基準測試中甚至略高於 Fable，而 Fable 是一個非常優秀的模型！」

brief_en: Quiet 12-hour window across frontier labs. Sam Altman invited developers to showcase GPT-5.6 Sol projects with OpenAI archive gifts for the coolest build; xAI's Elon Musk highlighted Grok 4.5 slightly edging Fable on software benchmarks and noted Grok Build keyboard/navigation/auth updates; Anthropic extended Fable 5 paid-plan access and higher Claude Code limits through July 19. No new flagship model releases.
brief_zh: 過去12小時前沿AI大廠動態平靜。Sam Altman 邀請開發者展示 GPT-5.6 Sol 作品，最佳者可獲 OpenAI 檔案館禮物；xAI Elon Musk 指出 Grok 4.5 在軟體基準略勝 Fable，並更新 Grok Build 鍵盤導航與認證功能；Anthropic 將 Fable 5 付費方案存取及 Claude Code 更高用量限制延長至7月19日。無重大新模型發布。
